description: This file contains a repository class 'TasksRepo' for managing task data in a database, including methods for creating, retrieving, updating, deleting, and listing tasks.
external_files: database connection object (implied, not explicitly imported)

classes.name: TasksRepo
classes.description: Repository class providing CRUD and query operations for tasks stored in a database.

methods.name: __init__(self, conn)
methods.description: Initializes the repository with a database connection.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] create( self, *, user_id: str, title: str, description: Optional[str], status: str, priority: str, due_date: Optional[date], )
methods.description: Inserts a new task into the database and returns the created task.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] get(self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str)
methods.description: Retrieves a specific task by ID for a given user.

methods.name: bool delete(self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str)
methods.description: Deletes a task by ID for a specific user, returns whether it was successful.

methods.name: Optional[Dict[str,Any]] update( self, *, user_id: str, task_id: str, fields: Dict[str, Any], )
methods.description: Updates specified fields of a task, returns the updated task.

methods.name: Tuple[List[Dict[str,Any]],int] list( self, *, user_id: str, q: Optional[str], status: Optional[str], priority: Optional[str], due_from: Optional[date], due_to: Optional[date], sort: str, order: str, limit: int, offset: int, )
methods.description: Lists tasks with filtering, sorting, and pagination.
